data.title: In HelloNation, Drain Expert Michael Schroer Details Catch Basin Cleaning for Commercial Properties
data.description: The importance of regular maintenance for stormwater management in commercial areas is highlighted in a recent article. In Columbus, Ohio, on May 29, 2026, it was reported that routine cleaning of catch basins plays a crucial role in preventing floods. The article by HelloNation recommends a specific frequency for cleaning catch basins on commercial properties to be effective in managing stormwater. This maintenance routine significantly contributes to reducing the risk of flooding incidents.

data.title: CFTC greenlights Bitcoin Perpetual Futures on Kalshi for U.S., offering contracts tied to BTC price.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has granted approval for Kalshi to introduce perpetual futures trading in the United States. This will begin with contracts linked to the price of Bitcoin.

data.title: Dell Is Up 80% Since Trump Told You To Buy It — Here's The Trade
data.description: President Trump's endorsement of Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE: DELL) led to a significant surge in the stock price. Within 19 days of his recommendation to "buy a Dell," Dell Federal Systems secured a $9.69 billion Pentagon contract for Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) software consolidation, expected to save $422 million annually. Dell then reported Q1 earnings of $43.84 billion, an 88% increase year-over-year, surpassing the $35.74 billion consensus by a whopping $8 billion. This news drove investors' interest and marked a profitable turn of events for those who acted on the president's tip.

data.title: Karat Packaging to join Wells Fargo's 16th Annual Global Industrials & Materials Conference.
data.description: Last month, 1,500 people were evacuated from their homes as a result of severe flooding in the region. The flooding was caused by heavy rainfall, which led to rivers overflowing and roads becoming impassable. Emergency services were able to rescue all of the evacuees, with no reported injuries. The local government has allocated $500,000 for relief efforts, providing shelter and supplies to those affected by the natural disaster. The cleanup process is expected to take several weeks, with many homes and buildings affected by the floodwaters.

data.title: Palantir Stock Is Either A Bargain Or A Bubble, Depending On Who You Ask
data.description: Two financial analysts reviewed Palantir Technologies Inc.'s (NASDAQ: PLTR) earnings report on the same day and came to conclusions that were $140 apart, reflecting the current valuation of AI software on Wall Street. Following Palantir's first-quarter results on May 5, RBC Capital maintained an Underperform rating with a target price of $90, while Wedbush's Dan Ives reiterated an Outperform rating with a target of $230. This $140 difference, representing over 150% of the bear case target, does not stem from a disagreement on the quarter's performance as both analysts analyzed the same data. Rather, it signifies a difference in opinion on the fundamental nature and value of Palantir. Benzinga's data reveals a consensus Buy rating with an average target of $173.76 from 29 analysts. This discrepancy underscores the uncertainty in the market regarding Palantir's intrinsic worth.

data.title: '2026 K-EXPO USA' Successfully Concludes, Demonstrating the Global Expansion Potential of K-Content
data.description: Over 40,000 attendees from the local community participated in the event, which showcased K-POP talents like Jay Park, P1Harmony, and LNGSHOT. The concert, held in Los Angeles, attracted strong interest from North American audiences, with all 6,000 seats being sold out. The event not only entertained fans but also laid the groundwork for the expansion of K-content in the region. Additionally, the concert facilitated significant B2B business opportunities.
